'''Kulless''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gerres Gule]]. Members of the species were bipedal, with a round torso and a thick tail. In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], the Kulless [[Shrivel Braittrand]] competed on the professional [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] circuit, piloting a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] of his own design. Braittrand was particularly favored on the [[SoroSuub Facility]] track.

==Biology and appearance==
The Kulless were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of bipeds. Their torso was muscular and barrel-shaped, with long [[Limb/Legends|arms]] that terminated in four-fingered hands. Their legs were shorter, with three anterior toes and one posterior toe. The Kulless had a thick tail that reached to the ground. As exemplified by [[Shrivel Braittrand]], they had brown pigmentation and their skin was dotted with some lumps.<ref name="Racer" />

The Kulless face was quite flat with deep-set [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], black in coloration, and a prominent brow. They had a stubby [[Nose/Legends|nose]], and white [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] behind pale lips.<ref name="Racer" />

==History==
The Kulless evolved on [[Gerres Gule]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and in the general region of the [[Dragonflower Nebula/Legends|Dragonflower Nebula]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Individual Kulless were found offworld from as early as [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]. Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], the Kulless Shrivel Braittrand traveled the galaxy as the chief [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] for the [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]]. Roor, a [[Sneevel/Legends|Sneevel]], eventually gave up racing to return to his career has as a [[Glimmik/Legends|glimmik]] [[Music/Legends|singer]], creating an opening for Braittrand on the circuit.<ref name="Racer" />

Scrapping his former employer's Podracer, Braittrand constructed an entirely new vehicle that he named the [[Kulless Squall]]. This Podracer was highly maneuverable and became one of the more impressive vehicles on the professional circuit. Braittrand drew upon his many years with Roor for experience, and was particularly favored on the [[SoroSuub Facility]] track on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]].<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Racer Revenge'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> He raced against the likes of [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]], [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]], and [[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]].<ref name="Racer" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Kulless first appeared in ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|video game]] developed in partnership between [[LucasArts]] and [[Rainbow Studios]]. It was released in [[2002]] for the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]] platform. In the game, the species was not named, but was represented by Shrivel Braittrand. He was later identified as a Kulless in the ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published by [[Prima Games]] in [[February]] 2002. The Kulless were also mentioned in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' under entries for Shrivel Braittrand and Gerres Gule.
